title: Stage Run Telemetry
description: Emitted to output/telemetry.json after every stage execution. One entry per run (append-only array).

run_id.description: Unique ID for this run. Format: [stage_id]-[ISO-8601-timestamp]. Example: data-store-2026-03-14T09:42:00Z

stage_id.description: Identifier of the stage that ran. Matches the folder name under programs/.

project_id.description: The project this stage belongs to. Matches the folder name under programs/.

program_id.description: The program this stage belongs to. Matches the folder name under programs/[project]/programs/.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the run started.

status.description: completed = all outputs produced and audit passed. partial = some outputs missing. failed = stage did not complete.

duration_ms.description: Wall-clock time in milliseconds from stage start to last output written.

inputs_loaded.description: File paths loaded during this run, relative to workspace root.

inputs_skipped.description: Files listed in CONTEXT.md What to Load that were NOT loaded this run. Empty array if none skipped.

outputs_produced.description: File paths written during this run, relative to workspace root.

audit_flags.description: Results of the stage's Audit section checklist.

result.description: SKIP only when the item is not applicable to this run.

routing_confidence.description: Optional. For intake-pipeline stages only. Confidence score (0–1) of the routing decision made.

notes.description: Optional. Free-text notes from the agent. Max 200 characters.
